name: Crispy Oven-Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Lightly spray a cookie sheet with non-stick spray and set aside.
3. Coat each chicken piece or breast half first in flour, rolling it evenly on all sides.
4. Dip the chicken into the egg whites.
5. Roll the chicken in cornflake crumbs.
6. Place the coated pieces on the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 45 to 55 minutes for chicken pieces or 20 to 30 minutes for boneless breast halves, until tender and no longer pink. Do not turn the chicken over during baking.
